core.sustainability.models.methane_metrics module

METHANE METRICS – Data classes for methane emissions

This module defines data structures for methane and CO₂e calculations.

Author: Deepak Panigrahy

class core.sustainability.models.methane_metrics.MethaneLeakageFactors(country_code: str, g_per_kwh: float, source: str, source_url: str, year: int, data_quality: str = 'medium')[source]

Bases: object

Grid methane leakage factors for a country.

country_code

ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code

Type:

str

g_per_kwh

Methane leakage in grams CH₄/kWh

Type:

float

source

Data source

Type:

str

year

Data year

Type:

int

data_quality

“high”, “medium”, “low”

Type:

str

country_code: str
data_quality: str = 'medium'
g_per_kwh: float
source: str
source_url: str
to_dict() → Dict[str, Any][source]

Convert to dictionary.

year: int
class core.sustainability.models.methane_metrics.MethaneMetrics(kg: float, co2e_20yr: float | None = None, co2e_100yr: float | None = None, source: str = 'IEA Methane Tracker 2026', source_url: str | None = 'https://www.iea.org/reports/global-methane-tracker-2026', year: int = 2026, gwp_source: str = 'IPCC AR6', gwp_source_url: str = 'https://www.ipcc.ch/report/ar6/wg1/chapter/chapter-7/', calculation_method: str = 'energy_kwh × grid_methane_leakage')[source]

Bases: object

Methane emissions metrics for a single measurement.

kg

Methane emitted in kilograms

Type:

float

co2e_20yr

CO₂ equivalent using 20-year GWP

Type:

float | None

co2e_100yr

CO₂ equivalent using 100-year GWP

Type:

float | None

source

Source of methane leakage data

Type:

str

year

Data year

Type:

int

gwp_source

Source for GWP values (IPCC AR6)

Type:

str

calculation_method

How this was derived

Type:

str

calculation_method: str = 'energy_kwh × grid_methane_leakage'
co2e_100yr: float | None = None
co2e_20yr: float | None = None
property grams: float

Methane in grams.

gwp_source: str = 'IPCC AR6'
gwp_source_url: str = 'https://www.ipcc.ch/report/ar6/wg1/chapter/chapter-7/'
kg: float
property milligrams: float

Methane in milligrams.

source: str = 'IEA Methane Tracker 2026'
source_url: str | None = 'https://www.iea.org/reports/global-methane-tracker-2026'

Convert to dictionary for serialization.

year: int = 2026
